claim_scope: High-risk mutual-edge-triangle slice of the 184 n=9 pre-vertex-circle selected-witness assignments, replayed through fixed-row radius-blocker and vertex-circle diagnostics; not a proof of n=9, not a counterexample, not an independent review of the exhaustive checker, and not a global status update.
interpretation: This packet isolates the mutual-edge-triangle part of the n=9 frontier, where the simple mutual-edge obstruction has no trigger.
Every selected assignment is still killed by the fixed-order vertex-circle quotient replay after the fixed-row radius-blocker packet check.
The two non-ear assignments are the existing bridge-frontier n=9 proof-mining targets.
The packet is diagnostic and review-pending; it is not an independent proof of the n=9 case.
No proof of Erdos Problem #97 and no counterexample are claimed.

selection_rule.description: Select pre-vertex-circle assignments whose mutual-edge graph contains at least one triangle and whose rows contain no simple mutual-edge obstruction-A trigger.
selection_rule.name: mutual_edge_triangle_without_simple_obstruction_a_trigger
